description:
When Juzo falls behind in school, his classmate Ryo Shiraishi starts tutoring him. He also joins the Home Ec Club run by Ryo’s older sister, Chisato. Noren joins too, hoping it’ll help with making ramen. Then, after Mitsuoka Pharma announces that whoever marries Noren will inherit the company, a cornered Noren blurts out something completely unexpected!
Source: Crunchyroll
